page_content:
Program Learning Outcomes 1. Graduates will be able to create, augment, debug, and test computer software. These skills will be built progressively through the courses in the introductory sequence and in some courses beyond that.

2. Graduates will develop mathematical and reasoning skills that are

needed for computer science.

3. Graduates will be able to design and implement programming

projects that are similar to those seen in the real world.

4. Graduates will gain skills in communication.

5. Academic Research (Optional): Graduates will be able to work
